candidates.text: I blended corn into a smoothie—turns out, it was just as bland as the name suggests.
I blended corn into my smoothie today—it was surprisingly refreshing, like drinking a field of expectations.
Why did I bring a blender to the cornfield? Because I heard they were hiring for a *maize*-ing career, and I wanted to make sure my resume stood out!
